title: Lophostoma calophylloides
intro: There is not enough information on Lophostoma calophylloides to provide the requested information.
taxonomy: Lophostoma calophylloides is a species of bat in the family Phyllostomidae. It is classified as a member of the subfamily Phyllostominae and the genus Lophostoma. The species is further divided into two subspecies: Lophostoma calophylloides calophylloides and Lophostoma calophylloides auripendulum. This classification is based on the species' unique physical characteristics and its geographical distribution. Lophostoma calophylloides is endemic to Central and South America.
uses: Unfortunately, I do not have information about the medicinal uses of Lophostoma calophylloides.
parts: Lophostoma calophylloides, a plant species, is known for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine.
